parameters.content:
## 💰 Quote Comparison & Vendor Selection Tool

### What this workflow does
1. Watches Google Drive folder for new vendor quote PDFs
2. Downloads and extracts quote details (items, pricing, terms)
3. Calculates effective pricing and checks quote validity
4. Logs to Google Sheets for side-by-side comparison
5. Notifies team on Slack with quote summary

### Setup steps
1. Create Google Drive folder for vendor quotes
2. Get PDF Vector API key from pdfvector.com/api-keys
3. Create Google Sheet with columns:
   Vendor, Quote #, Quote Date, Valid Until, Status, Items, Subtotal, Discount, Shipping, Tax, Grand Total, Currency, Delivery Days, Payment Terms, Warranty, Contact, Quote Link, Added Date
4. Update folder ID and spreadsheet ID in nodes
5. Connect Slack and set procurement channel

### Perfect for
- Procurement teams comparing bids
- Project managers evaluating contractors
- Business owners selecting vendors
- Freelancers comparing service quotes

## 📊 Extracted Fields

- Vendor name & contact
- Quote number & date
- Valid until date
- Line items with prices
- Subtotal, discounts, tax
- Shipping cost
- Grand total
- Payment terms
- Delivery timeline
- Warranty coverage
- Special conditions

parameters.prompt: Extract vendor quote data as flat fields. vendorName, vendorAddress, vendorContact, vendorEmail, vendorPhone, quoteNumber, quoteDate (YYYY-MM-DD), validUntil (YYYY-MM-DD), lineItemsList (semicolon-separated formatted as: itemCode description qty unit unitPrice total), itemCount (number), subtotal (number), discountAmount (number), discountPercent (number), shippingCost (number), taxAmount (number), taxRate (number), grandTotal (number), currency, deliveryDays (number), deliveryTerms, paymentTerms, warrantyMonths (number), warrantyDetails, specialConditions, notes.
